element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Verb command system (look, take, use, talk) established immediately
Icon-based system for item collection and combination
Voodoo Lady introduces magical puzzle-solving mechanics
Laundry collection and grave-robbing quests demonstrate resource gathering
Scabb, Phatt, and Booty Islands with ship travel between locations
Guybrush imprisoned by Governor Phatt; escape puzzle required
Bitter reunion establishes emotional stakes; relationship recovery motivation
Spitting competition, drinking contest, gambling games for map piece acquisition
Four pirates' map pieces; cartographer Wally determines location
LeChuck kidnaps Wally; fortress infiltration required
Elaborate trap with Wally; escape leads to explosion and island propulsion
Mazelike environment; talking parrot assists navigation
Concrete barrier; dynamite demolition triggers world-changing discovery
E ticket, first aid station, parental remains, elevator reveal meta-narrative

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Four-act structure with escalating stakes: Act 1 local conflict (Scabb), Act 2-3 distributed island hopping (Phatt/Booty map collection), Act 4 climactic fortress/excavation. Tension builds from personal/local (Largo embargo) to cosmic (LeChuck resurrection, world-altering treasure discovery).

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Side quests on each island (Mardi Gras party, spitting competition, bloodhound quest, glass-bottom boat, library catalog) branch from main map-piece objectives; voluntary participation in competitive challenges
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Underground facility beneath surface world contains meta-narrative secrets (parental remains, E ticket, elevator to previous game's Mêlée Island); excavation rewards exploration

difficulty_curve.early_game: Safe introduction phase on Scabb Island; Voodoo Lady tutorial role; simple resource gathering (laundry, graves). Optional 'Monkey 2 Lite' mode available for reduced puzzle complexity.
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Moderate difficulty escalation across three-island cycle (Scabb/Phatt/Booty). Phatt Island imprisonment raises stakes. Multiple puzzle types introduced: competitive challenges, NPC-dependent quests, dialogue consequence. Relationship tension with Elaine adds emotional difficulty.
difficulty_curve.late_game: Dangerous climax on Dinky Island. Mazelike navigation, excavation obstacles, death-trap escape, then final revelation in underground facility. Meta-narrative complexity (parents, E ticket, world revelation) demands narrative comprehension alongside mechanical puzzle-solving.
notable_spikes: Largo LaGrande encounter and resurrection of LeChuck (pivot from Act 1 to Act 2)
Cartographer kidnapping and fortress infiltration (Act 3-4 transition)
LeChuck death-trap sequence (mechanical and narrative climax)
Big Whoop excavation and facility discovery (world-state transformation)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each major location (Scabb, Phatt, Booty, Dinky) functions as a contained puzzle hub with multiple interconnected objectives. Primary goal (map piece acquisition) tied to optional challenges and NPC quests. Ship travel between islands creates natural load gates and progression checkpoints.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Booty Island: Mardi Gras party, spitting competition, bloodhound quest, drinking contest, glass-bottom boat figurehead retrieval all branch from single map-piece objective

notable_level_patterns.description: Scabb Island establishes Voodoo Lady as quest hub. Guybrush collects raw materials (laundry, graves) for doll crafting. This pattern repeats later when magical solutions unlock progression; inventory management becomes core mechanic.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Scabb Island swamp: resource gathering→crafting→enemy defeat

notable_level_patterns.description: Involuntary confinement creates self-contained puzzle zones. Two distinct imprisonment scenarios: Governor Phatt dungeon (mid-game), LeChuck death-trap fortress (late-game). Escape mechanics force creative inventory usage and lateral thinking.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Phatt Island governor's prison; LeChuck's fortress death-trap

notable_level_patterns.description: Dinky Island jungle requires navigation assistance. Talking parrot provides direction hints. Maze structure signals danger zone; linear progression through non-linear space. Precedes revelation of underground facility.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Dinky Island jungle → Big Whoop burial site

notable_level_patterns.description: Buried location discovery (concrete barrier→dynamite) serves dual function: mechanical puzzle solution and narrative trigger. Explosion propels story forward and unlocks meta-narrative (underground facility). Bridges surface world and hidden reality.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Big Whoop site: dig action→concrete obstacle→dynamite solution→facility access
